author: Mattia Stella
description: Notion-style timeline view for Bases: plan project notes on draggable bars with statuses, priorities and dates. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: mmattia09
manifest.description: Notion-style timeline view for Bases: plan project notes on draggable bars with statuses, priorities and dates.
manifest.name: Bases Timeline

name: Bases Timeline

releases.author: mmattia09
releases.description: - Fix: the toolbar search no longer returns zero results when the view has no visible properties configured; it now defaults to matching the file name. If search still misses, add properties (e.g. file name, status) in the view's Properties menu.

releases.author: mmattia09
releases.description:
- Fix: first click on a bar no longer gets eaten when another pane had focus (identical result sets no longer rebuild the DOM)
- Fix: smoother toolbar search - the view only re-renders when the filtered results actually change
- Review feedback: typed frontmatter callbacks, window.requestAnimationFrame for popout windows, no :has() selector, builtin-modules replaced with node:module, declarative settings (settings now searchable in Obsidian 1.13+)

releases.author: mmattia09
releases.description:
- Drag projects between status groups from the side panel
- Click the priority pill on a bar to change the priority from a menu
- Notes open as new tabs next to an existing side split instead of replacing the timeline
- Iconize integration: project icons (emoji or icon packs) shown in the side panel and on bars
- Persistent fading date labels on hover/drag; sticky edge arrows that stay anchored while scrolling

releases.author: mmattia09
releases.description:
Initial release of Bases Timeline.

- Notion-style timeline view for Obsidian Bases
- Collapsible side panel with project list (default view on mobile)
- Draggable bars: move projects or resize start/end dates, with date labels on hover and while dragging
- Quick-schedule unscheduled projects by hovering their row
- Edge arrows to jump to off-screen bars
- 7 zoom levels (day to 5 years), collapsible status groups, priority sorting
- Interface in English, Italian, French, German and Spanish
